description: Shared AI memory platform — gives every LLM (Claude CLI, aicli CLI, Cursor, web UI) identical project memory, billing, multi-LLM workflows, and a unified knowledge graph across all tools.

tech_stack.frontend: Vanilla JS (no framework, no bundler) + Electron shell + Vite dev server
tech_stack.db_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}, pr_graph_runs; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles, user_api_keys (encrypted)
tech_stack.authentication: JWT (python-jose) + bcrypt + DEV_MODE toggle; 3 roles: admin/paid/free
tech_stack.llm_providers: Claude (Haiku for synthesis), OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok
tech_stack.workflow_engine: Async DAG executor (asyncio.gather) + YAML config; per-node retry/continue logic
tech_stack.memory_synthesis: Claude Haiku dual-layer (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 output files)
tech_stack.chunking: Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function (Python/JS/TS) + per-section (MD) + per-file (diff)
tech_stack.mcp: Stdio MCP server with 12+ tools; env var configured (BACKEND_URL, ACTIVE_PROJECT)
tech_stack.deployment: Railway (Dockerfile + railway.toml); local: bash start_backend.sh + ui/npm run dev; desktop: Electron-builder
tech_stack.database_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}, pr_graph_runs; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles
tech_stack.config_management: config.py with externalized settings; YAML for pipeline definitions; pyproject.toml for IDE support
tech_stack.db_tables: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}, pr_graph_runs; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles
tech_stack.llm_provider_adapters: agents/providers/ with pr_ prefix for pricing and provider implementations
tech_stack.pipeline_engine: Async DAG executor (asyncio.gather for parallel nodes) + YAML config; per-node retry/continue logic; centralized under workflows/ with pipeline_ prefix
tech_stack.pipeline_ui: Cytoscape.js + cytoscape-dagre for graph visualization; 2-pane approval panel for chat negotiation
tech_stack.billing_storage: data/provider_storage/ (provider_costs.json); pricing, coupons, user_logs in SQL tables
tech_stack.backend_modules: routers/ for API endpoints, core/ for infrastructure, data/ for data access (dl_ prefix), agents/tools/ for agent implementations (tool_ prefix), agents/mcp/ for MCP server
tech_stack.dev_environment: PyProject.toml + VS Code launch config (.vscode/launch.json); PyCharm: Mark backend/ as Sources Root
tech_stack.database: PostgreSQL 15+ per-project schema + shared auth/usage tables; agent roles initialized
tech_stack.node_modules_build: npm 8+ with webpack/Electron-builder; dev server Vite on localhost
tech_stack.build_tooling: npm 8+ with webpack/Electron-builder; Vite dev server on localhost

key_decisions: Engine/workspace separation: aicli/ backend logic; workspace/ per-project content; _system/ project state
Dual storage model transitioning to DB-only: PostgreSQL 15+ with pgvector (1536-dim) for semantic search; JSONL migration planned
Electron UI with xterm.js + Monaco editor + Cytoscape.js; Vanilla JS frontend (no framework/bundler); Vite dev server
JWT authentication (python-jose + bcrypt) with DEV_MODE toggle; 3-tier roles (admin/paid/free); per-user encrypted API keys
All LLM providers as independent adapters (Claude Haiku for synthesis); server holds API keys; client sends none
Async DAG workflow executor via asyncio.gather with loop-back and max_iterations cap; Cytoscape.js visualization with 2-pane approval
Memory synthesis: Claude Haiku dual-layer (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 output files); smart chunking per language/section
Per-project tables: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}; shared auth/usage tables
Tags load once on project access into memory; cache invalidation on session/project switch forces re-load from DB
SQL queries as module-level constants (_SQL_VERB_ENTITY pattern); dynamic query building via build_update() for safe parameterization
MCP server (stdio) with 12+ tools; configured via env vars (BACKEND_URL, ACTIVE_PROJECT); embedding and data retrieval
Hierarchical data model: Clients contain multiple Users; authentication pattern: login_as_first_level_hierarchy
_ensure_shared_schema pattern replaces ensure_project_schema; retry logic handles empty project list on first load
Embeddings linked to tags: tag metadata captures context (auth→all authentication prompts; feature/bug→relevant code changes)
Backend modular: core/ for infrastructure, data/ (dl_ prefix) for data access, routers/ for HTTP endpoints, agents/ for business logic
implemented_features: 5-layer memory architecture with /memory endpoint + LLM synthesis via Haiku
Unified history.jsonl across all LLM tools (ui, claude_cli, workflow, cursor)
Per-LLM memory files: _system/claude/CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, cursor/rules.md, aicli/context.md
Multi-LLM REPL: Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok with streaming + retry
YAML workflow executor: file injection, retry, cost tracking, inject_previous_output
Graph workflow engine: async DAG with Cytoscape.js UI, parallel nodes, loop-back edges
FastAPI backend: auth, chat SSE streaming, projects, admin, billing, git, history, workflows, entities, search
Electron UI: collapsible sidebar, 8 tabs (Chat, Summary, Prompts, Code, Flows, Projects, History, Admin)
JWT auth: admin/paid/free roles; DEV_MODE; first-user=admin; REQUIRE_AUTH toggle
Admin panel: 6 tabs (Users, Pricing, Coupons, API Keys, Usage, Billing/Costs)
Multi-user billing: balance, markup, coupons, transaction log, provider balances
Entity/relationship model: categories, values, events, event_tags, event_links (per-project tables)
Session tags + commit tagging (phase/feature/bug_ref); bulk session-tag endpoint
Projects tab: Features/Tasks/Bugs with status toggle, archive, inline create, event_count
History tab: unified sessions + Commits tab (tag inline) + Tags (⬡) tab with 3-column layout
Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function/section/file-diff with metadata filters
Semantic search: pgvector cosine similarity with language/doc_type/file_path/chunk_type filters
MCP server: 8 tools registered in .mcp.json + .cursor/mcp.json
Per-project DB schema: project_table() + ensure_project_schema(); migration endpoint
Claude CLI hooks: auto-commit-push, log_session_stop (reads .jsonl, updates history)
Git auto-deploy: commit-push from UI, auto-pull, LLM-generated commit messages
4-step project wizard: Basics → Git → IDE Support → Review
UI installer: install.sh (one-time setup) + update.sh (git pull) + start.sh
config.py reads ~/.aicli/config.json for WORKSPACE_DIR at startup
in_progress: Data persistence bug: tags disappear on session switch—root cause investigation ongoing; unclear if UI rendering vs database save failure; requires validation via /memory audit
Memory_items and project_facts table population not implemented—per specification these tables should update to enable improved memory/context mechanism; PENDING implementation and testing
Project visibility bug investigation—AiCli appears in Recent projects but not displaying as current active project in main view; suspected timing issue during backend initialization

Backend startup stability fixes—resolved port 127.0.0.1:8000 binding conflicts; documented proper initialization sequence via bash start_backend.sh; retry logic handles empty project list on first load
Memory endpoint CLAUDE.md template validation—code_dir variable scoped/fixed at line 1120 to resolve runtime failures; endpoint template variable scoping now correct
JSONL vs. database storage consolidation—migrate away from dual JSONL/DB storage toward DB-only tables to simplify data persistence and eliminate redundant calls

project_management_page: Project dashboard card: active features (count + top 3), open tasks, recent commits (last 3), workflow runs (last run status + duration)
Activity timeline view: unified event stream (prompts + commits + workflow runs) per project, filterable by type and date
Quick actions panel: + New Feature, + New Task, + New Bug, Run Workflow, Open in Claude CLI
Feature detail panel: click feature → see linked events, commits, workflow runs, related bugs
Kanban-style task board: columns = backlog / in-progress / review / done, drag to move status
Bulk operations: select multiple tasks/features, bulk-tag with phase or entity value
workflow_improvements: Step-by-step run log: per-node timing, token count, cost, output preview in collapsible rows
Re-run from node: click any completed node and re-run from that point with edited prompt
Workflow templates: library of pre-built workflows (feature_cycle, code_review, bug_fix, doc_update) stored in workspace/_templates/workflows/
Feature-linked workflows: when running a workflow, select which feature/task it belongs to; auto-tag all emitted events
Workflow result → task: workflow output can create/update a task entity; closes the loop between AI work and project tracking

deployment.update: bash ui/update.sh (git pull + reinstall deps, never touches workspace/)
deployment.desktop: Electron-builder: Mac dmg (arm64+x64), Windows nsis, Linux AppImage+deb

_synthesis_cache.project_summary: aicli is a shared AI memory platform enabling Claude CLI and other LLM platforms to access persistent work context across sessions through a hierarchical data model (Clients → Users → Projects) with PostgreSQL semantic storage, MCP integration for embedding-based retrieval, and async DAG workflow execution. Currently at v2.2.0 with 16 active features/tasks spanning UI, authentication, shared memory, tagging, billing, and embeddings; near-term focus on resolving data persistence bugs, completing memory table population, and consolidating JSONL/DB storage layers.
_synthesis_cache.memory_digest: **2026-03-18** `SESSION_SUMMARY` — Removed stale `ensure_project_schema()` call from main.py; fixed memory endpoint CLAUDE.md `code_dir` variable scoping at line 1120; enhanced backend startup retry logic to handle edge case where projects list returns empty on first load. **2026-03-14** `PROJECT_STATE` — Confirmed hierarchical data model (Clients → Users); identified 16 active feature/task/bug entities with 1,200+ total events/commits; documented memory management patterns and tag persistence issue requiring investigation. **2026-03-10** `ARCHITECTURE_AUDIT` — Implemented load-once tag caching strategy on project access to reduce redundant SQL calls; approved nested tag hierarchy expansion; discovered critical data persistence bug where tags disappear on session switch; identified UI visibility issues for memory suggestions and action buttons. **2026-03-10** `STABILITY_FIXES` — Resolved port 127.0.0.1:8000 binding conflicts through documented bash start_backend.sh initialization sequence; stabilized backend startup race condition handling. **PENDING** — memory_items and project_facts table update logic not yet implemented; project visibility bug requires further investigation; JSONL-to-DB migration needed to eliminate dual storage complexity.
